en: And all of this brings us back to Donald Trump, who is now set to amplify every single problem
ko: 그리고 이 모든 건 도널드 트럼프로 돌아와. 내가 설명한 모든 문제를 증폭시킬 거니까.

en: that I've described so far, because presidential libraries
seem almost designed to exploit his every personal failing,
ko: 대통령 도서관은 그의 모든 개인적 결점을 이용하도록 거의 설계된 것 같아.

en: from his tendency to obfuscate his wrongdoing, to his desire to build expensive monuments to himself,
ko: 잘못을 은폐하려는 경향, 자기 기념물을 세우려는 욕망,

en: to a set of ethical guidelines based more in norms than law.
Because the fact is, as things stand right now, someone could walk up to Trump today
ko: 법보다 관행에 기반한 윤리 지침까지. 사실 지금 상태로는 누군가 오늘 트럼프에게

en: with a $15 million check, hand it to him while saying, and we love the work that you are doing.
ko: 1,500만 달러 수표를 주면서 "좋은 일 하시는 거 좋아해요. 아까 논의한 그 문제 좀 도와주시면"

en: I hope that you'll consider helping us out with that little problem that we were discussing earlier.
And as long as that check said, pay to the order of the Donald J. Trump Presidential Library Foundation,
ko: 이라고 말해도 그 수표에 "도널드 J. 트럼프 대통령 도서관 재단 귀중"이라고 적혀 있으면

en: it would be completely legal. Though, don't worry, what soulless,
ko: 완전히 합법이야. 걱정 마. 어떤 영혼 없고 윤리적으로 파산한

en: ethically bankrupt ass kissing corporation would even think of doing something like that?
ko: 아첨 기업이 그런 걸 하겠어?

en: Please stay the fuck away from us!
You are not my real business, daddy, and you never will be!
And the legal settlements that we know about are bad enough, but that's just the beginning
ko: 제발 우리한테서 떨어져. 넌 내 진짜 비즈니스 대디가 아니고 절대 되지 못할 거야.

en: of the money involved here. Funds left over from the $239 million
raised by the Trump-Vance inaugural committee, including millions from tech companies and CEOs,
are also expected to be redirected to Trump's library.
ko: 알려진 법적 합의금만으로도 충분히 나쁜데 돈은 그게 시작일 뿐이야.

en: And that's not even getting into the $400 million plane
given to Trump by Qatar, which is also slated to be transferred to the Trump library
ko: 트럼프-밴스 취임위원회가 모금한 2억 3,900만 달러의 남은 자금도

en: shortly before he leaves office. And that gift is being flown directly through the library loophole.
ko: 트럼프 도서관으로 돌려질 예정이야. 카타르가 준

en: The Constitution prohibits anyone holding federal office
ko: 4억 달러 비행기도 안 빼고.

en: from accepting a personal gift from a foreign head of state.
But sources say Attorney General Pam Bondi has concluded that this gift is, quote,
ko: 트럼프가 퇴임 직전에 도서관으로 이전될 예정이야. 그 선물은 도서관

en: legally permissible because the plane is not being given to an individual,
ko: 허점을 통해 직접 들어가고 있어. 헌법은 연방 공직자가

en: but rather to the U.S. Air Force, and then to Donald Trump's foundation.
Oh, come on. We all know what is going to happen here.
ko: 완전히 필연적이야. 트럼프 퇴임 후 피트 헥세스가 폭스 뉴스 쇼를 받을 것처럼.

en: He's going to use that plane while in office, and then instead of leaving it for the next president to use,
ko: 하지만 법무장관 팸 본디는 이 선물이

en: he's going to keep it for his library, and suddenly discover he has a lot of library-related business
ko: "법적으로 허용 가능"하다고 결론 내렸대. 비행기가 개인이 아니라 미 공군에 주어진 후

en: to do all over the world. It's just completely inevitable.
Kind of like how after Trump leaves office, Pete Hegseth will get his own Fox News show,
ko: 도널드 트럼프의 재단에 가는 거니까. 무슨 일이

en: Caroline Levitt will go on Dancing With The Stars and get voted off after two weeks,
ko: 일어날지 다 알잖아. 재임 중에 그 비행기를 쓰고 다음 대통령에게 남기는 대신

en: and Stephen Miller will return to the cocoon that he emerged from.
ko: 도서관용으로 갖고 전 세계에 도서관 관련 업무가 많다는 걸 갑자기 발견할 거야.

en: We all know these things are going to happen.
ko: 완전히 필연적이야. 트럼프 퇴임 후 피트 헥세스가 폭스 뉴스 쇼를 받을 것처럼.

en: We all know these things are going to happen.
ko: 완전히 필연적이야. 트럼프 퇴임 후 피트 헥세스가 폭스 뉴스 쇼를 받을 것처럼.
